task_description: Add 5 world-class packages to the Quant Ecosystem: social-graph engine, gaming engine, ML pipeline, advanced frontend systems in shared-ui, and observability stack. Total ecosystem reached 26 packages with 275,424 lines of code.

verification.summary: NODE_OPTIONS='' node scripts/test.js passes: 1,202 TypeScript files, 4,903 exports, 275,424 lines of code across 26 packages. All new packages (social-graph, gaming, ml-pipeline, observability, shared-ui/advanced) have real algorithm implementations averaging 300-500 lines per file.
